creator: andrej@ebert.su
text: Sorry for the noise, it really does crash when running maintenance tasks (series refresh, etc), didn't notice it the first few hours. Maybe upstream (https://github.com/Sonarr/Sonarr/issues/1529, https://forums.sonarr.tv/t/sonarr-on-linux-now-crashing-after-a-few-secs/12254) will do something about it.
